Subject: I need to practice, submissions not working

Issue: none of the submissions across any challenges are working on your website
Subject: Issue while taking the test
Response: If your challenges do not load or show an infinite Processing message, try closing the challenge window and reopening it using the same challenge link. Also, ensure your internet connection is stable and try opening the challenge in another supported browser. If you do not see your challenge results, wait for the challenge results to process, check the leaderboard, and confirm you are using the correct account. If the issue persists, contact HackerRank support at help@hackerrank.com.
Justification: The provided documents, specifically 'Coding Challenges FAQs', contain steps to troubleshoot the issue with challenges not loading or showing results.

Issue: Hi, please pause our subscription. We have stopped all hiring efforts for now.
Subject: Subscription pause
Response: To pause your subscription, follow these steps: Access Subscription Settings by clicking on the profile icon in the top-right corner of the page and selecting Settings from the dropdown menu. Navigate to the Billing section under Subscription. However, please note that the Pause Subscription feature is only available for monthly subscription plans, and your subscription must be at least 30 days old. For more information, see the Pause Subscription article.
Justification: The user's question is answered in the 'Pause Subscription' document, which provides step-by-step instructions on how to pause a subscription.

Issue: Hello, I have completed an assessment, but my name is incorrect on the certificate. Can you please update it
Subject: Certificate name update
Response: To update the name on your certificate, follow these steps: 1. Open your certificate page. 2. In the Full Name field, enter the name you want to display. 3. Click Regenerate Certificate. 4. In the confirmation dialog, click Update Name.
Justification: The Certifications FAQs document provides a clear answer to the user's question, outlining the steps to update the name on a certificate.
